name: Trimble Agriculture Technology API
what_it_does: Trimble Agriculture precision farming and farm management information system (FMIS) REST API for precision agriculture operations including field mapping, crop management, machine telemetry, and agronomic data integration. Enables AI agents to manage field boundary and farm data management for digital farm map automation, handle as-applied and as-planted prescription map delivery for precision agriculture workflow, access machine telemetry and GPS guidance data for farm equipment fleet intelligence automation, retrieve yield data and harvest analytics for crop performance reporting automation, manage agronomic prescription and variable rate application planning for input optimization automation, handle farm task and work order management for farming operations automation, access soil sampling and nutrient management data for precision soil health automation, retrieve weather and field condition monitoring for crop management decision automation, manage fleet and equipment utilization for farm machinery cost management, and integrate Trimble Agriculture with John Deere Operations Center, CNH, AGCO, and FMIS platforms via Agriculture Data Platform (ADP).
use_cases: Delivering prescription maps from precision ag agents
Tracking machine telemetry from farm fleet agents
Analyzing yield data from crop analytics agents
Managing farm tasks from operations agents
not_for: Food safety and supply chain traceability (use FoodLogiQ or IBM Food Trust)
Agricultural commodity trading and market data
Livestock and dairy farm management (use DairyComp or CattleMax)
best_when: A large row crop or specialty crop farming operation, precision agriculture service provider, or ag technology integrator wanting AI agents to automate prescription delivery, machine telemetry collection, yield analytics, and farm task management within Trimble Agriculture's FMIS ecosystem.
avoid_when: MACHINE CONTROLLER PRESCRIPTION DELIVERY SAFETY: Automated variable rate prescription delivery to farm machine controllers (Trimble TMX-2050, GFX-750) must validate prescription map coordinate alignment with current field boundary before machine application; automated prescription delivery with coordinate error creates off-target application of crop inputs, potential crop damage, and setback violation near water bodies. PESTICIDE APPLICATION RESTRICTED-ENTRY INTERVAL AND BUFFER COMPLIANCE: Automated spray application scheduling via Trimble Agriculture must enforce EPA label restricted-entry intervals (REI) and buffer zone requirements for pesticide application near water bodies and schools; automated application scheduling without label compliance check creates EPA label violation and environmental liability. ANHYDROUS AMMONIA AND NITROGEN APPLICATION REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Automated variable-rate nitrogen application plans must comply with state nutrient management plan requirements and 4R (right source, right rate, right time, right place) principles; automated nitrogen application exceeding agronomic rate creates state nutrient management plan violation and water quality liability.

auth.notes: Trimble Agriculture uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Westminster, Colorado HQ (Trimble Agriculture, division of Trimble Inc., NASDAQ: TRMB). Trimble $3.7B+ revenue. Trimble Agriculture includes: Trimble Precision-IQ (FMIS), xFarm (European FMIS acquired 2022), Vantage (precision ag retail partner), and Farmers Edge (satellite imagery and analytics, partial ownership). Trimble Agriculture Data Platform (ADP) enables FMIS interoperability. Competes with John Deere Operations Center, Climate FieldView, and Granular for digital agriculture platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-acre or per-machine subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per acre or per connected machine; FMIS, machine telemetry, and precision ag modules; Vantage retail network pricing varies by dealer
pricing.notes: Westminster CO. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. $3.7B+ revenue. Precision-IQ FMIS, xFarm (EU), Vantage retail. Per-acre or per-machine annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; telemetry ingestion and prescription upload throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — MACHINE TELEMETRY AND FIELD EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Trimble Agriculture does not support native webhooks; automated machine telemetry collection, prescription delivery confirmation, and field operation completion detection require scheduled polling; design polling intervals aligned with field operation cycles (planting, spraying, harvesting)

PRESCRIPTION MAP COORDINATE SYSTEM AND BOUNDARY ALIGNMENT VALIDATION: Automated prescription map delivery to machine controllers must validate coordinate reference system (CRS) and confirm prescription boundary alignment with current season field boundary; CRS mismatch or field boundary shift from tile drainage or land changes creates off-target application area

PESTICIDE LABEL BUFFER ZONE AND REI COMPLIANCE: Automated spray application scheduling must incorporate EPA label buffer zone distances from water bodies, school properties, and sensitive areas; automated scheduling without buffer zone enforcement creates EPA label violation (a federal crime under FIFRA); implement geospatial buffer zone check per pesticide applied

Trimble Agriculture Data Platform (ADP) interoperability consent requirement — Trimble ADP enables data sharing between Trimble Agriculture and third-party FMIS platforms (John Deere Operations Center, Climate FieldView); automated data sharing via ADP requires grower explicit consent per data sharing agreement; automated data pull from grower account without ADP consent workflow creates unauthorized data access

xFarm EU vs Trimble Precision-IQ US API differentiation — Trimble Agriculture operates xFarm (EU FMIS, acquired 2022) and Trimble Precision-IQ (US/AU FMIS) on separate platforms with distinct APIs; EU precision agriculture automation should use xFarm API; US/AU automation should use Trimble Precision-IQ API; applying wrong platform API to geographic region creates integration failure

Machine controller firmware version for prescription format compatibility — Trimble field controllers (Trimble TMX-2050, GFX-750) require prescription files in supported format (ISOXML, Trimble native) matching controller firmware version; automated prescription generation must verify target controller model and firmware before format selection; format mismatch creates prescription loading failure in field
agent_readiness.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Field boundary, machine telemetry, and crop data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Farm boundary, crop, and machine data.
